prompt: A dreamy pastel pink Japanese mobile game advertisement poster in a vertical smartphone format, kawaii fantasy style, ultra-cute and glossy. The main subject is a fluffy white baby kitten with huge sparkling violet-blue eyes, soft blush on its cheeks, tiny pink nose, and a mischievous smile, lying on a pink cushion or blanket in the foreground while holding a baby bottle in its paws. The kitten is extremely fluffy and round, with soft glowing fur and a plush-toy feel, lit with warm magical highlights. The entire scene is filled with pink hearts, sparkles, lace details, soft bokeh, and candy-colored decorations, creating a soothing but playful atmosphere. In the background is a pastel pink bedroom or nursery interior with shelves holding exactly 3 stuffed animals: a pink rabbit, a mint-blue cat, and a lavender bear. Add translucent floating soap-bubble circles with white bone-shaped icons inside, small decorative charms, ribbons, and floral ornaments. On the left side, large bold vertical Japanese headline text in glossy bubble lettering reads 「脱出できない」 with smaller vertical text beside it reading 「かわいくて、」, all in bright pink with white glow and thick outline. Near the top inside a white lace-edged circular badge, include Japanese text reading 「もふもふ にゃんこと おへやから脱出？」 with a pink paw print icon beneath it. At the bottom, place a decorative game logo with large rounded Japanese text reading 「もふふミルクと にゃんこ」 and a ribbon banner below reading 「脱出ゲーム」, using pastel teal, cream, and pink colors with a shiny outlined style. Add a small rounded text plaque in the lower left that reads 「癒されるのに、意外とむずかしい…!?」 decorated with tiny flowers and a dangling baby bottle charm. Use a polished promotional key visual look for a cute indie app, highly detailed, soft airbrushed illustration, glossy typography, enchanting, comforting, and irresistibly adorable.
